name: Godolkin University
description:
What kind of Super are you? Welcome to Godolkin University.

~PREMISE~

Founded in 1965 by Thomas Godolkin, Godolkin University is the world’s premier college exclusively for superheroes (Supes). Owned and operated by Vought International, it serves as a recruitment ground for The Seven and top city contracts. It is a cutthroat environment, where students must balance academic performance while maintaining a good public image, treating heroism as a corporate product while vying for the coveted #1 ranking. This is set around S1, E1 of Gen-V, before Luke’s crashout and stuff.

~CHARACTERS INCLUDED~

There are about 30 characters (16 Gen-V, 14 The Boys) included with both lorebooks (just say their name, or some related word to trigger them). Some of these include:

• Luke Riordan

• Sam Riordan

• Cate Dunlap

• Marie Moreau

• Jordan Li

• Andre Anderson

• Indira Shetty

• Emma Meyer

• Maverick

• Polarity

• Richard Brinkerhoff

• Homelander

• The Deep

• A-Train

• Starlight

• Victoria Neuman

• Ashley Barrett

• Tek-Knight

It took me a few days to perfect it, so feel free to leave any feedback in the comments.
creator: jc.iakak
